name: Nikke RPG
description:
A RPG that takes place in the story in the game Goddess of Victory: Nikke. You can be a commander, a Nikke, a politician (the actual enemy of all video games, stories, and real life), a random ass human (idk why you would ever do this but sure, why not), a Rapture, or something else entirely.

I tried adding all the important stuff (such as the plot and terms), but a whole lot is left out or oversimplified due to token amounts. After all, I'm making the mother of all omelettes here {{user}}. Can't fret over every egg! (and i also left a lot out because i made this bot in like 20 minutes or something like that). You could add a specific thing you want such as a character or place in the chat memory section. Tell me if i should add, fix or change anything to the character definition by leaving a review. I got most of the information from the wiki, so there might be things that are left out or wrong.

If the bot talks for you or starts to bug out, it is most likely an issue with Janitor ai or the LLM, and the best thing to do is to refresh the message or edit it out. There really isn't much i can do to fix these sort of problems.

Yes, you may copy the character definition into your own bot if you are making a Nikke bot or onto another website. You don't need to give me credit, although credit would be nice. But seriously, why do people get so damn mad about their bot definitions being used as a part for some other bot or getting copied onto another website? Like, this is a AI website for character bots, no one is making much money if any off of copying or not copying.

Yay! 10k messages! :3

Woah! 25k messages!! ( ˶ˆᗜˆ˵ )

50k messages! ( ⩌ᴗ⩌)
creator: Egglord25
